description_long: This is a stylized, medium-sized barrel or bucket with a polygonal, faceted design and a warm brown coloration. The object features a prominent, angular lid with a central knob or peg and a single bail handle attached to the top, suggesting it can be carried or hung. Decorative horizontal bands encircle the body, providing both visual interest and implied structural reinforcement. One side of the barrel displays a large, engraved keyhole motif surrounded by a spiky, sunburst-like pattern, along with a few circular markings above it. The surface appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, with a matte finish and subtle shading to indicate volume. This object would likely be found in an urban setting such as a street, park, or near a garage, serving as a storage or decorative container.
description: A stylized brown barrel or bucket with a faceted lid, bail handle, and engraved keyhole motif, featuring decorative bands and a matte wood-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bail handle and the upper decorative band, with a partial view of the engraved motif on the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the central knob or peg on the lid and the polygonal shape, with no visible handle or markings.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the bail handle and a partial view of the engraved motif on the opposite side.
description_view_3: View displaying the engraved keyhole motif and circular markings, with the central knob on the lid visible.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: engraved keyhole motif with circular markings
